svg.aria-label: Weekly security digest cover 2026-04-12: Citizen Lab Webloc ad-data surveillance tracking 500 million devices, international crypto fraud crackdown identifying 20000 plus victims, ChatGPT launches 100 dollar Pro subscription to compete with Claude
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-04-12: Citizen Lab Webloc (500M devices), Crypto Fraud (20K+ victims), ChatGPT Pro ($100)

g.text: Law enforcement tracked 500M+ devices via ad SDK
Cobwebs Webloc : IDFA / AAID geo-track : Hungarian intel + US LE + El Salvador
Programmatic ad infra abuse : SDK supply-chain privacy risk
NCA-led operation : UK / US / Canada joint action
Domain spoofing + DeFi scams + blockchain mixing laundering
Smart contract abuse : social engineering : crypto theft chain
OpenAI price-match challenge to Anthropic Claude
GPT-4 Turbo priority : extended context vs $200 Max tier
AI code review governance : data leakage risk : policy needed
